projects.title: AFCR
projects.subtitle: Automation IN Film Censorship
projects.description: "Automated Film Censorship uses AI and Machine Learning to detect sensitive content, generate timestamps, recommend age ratings, and assist censor boards in making faster, more accurate, and consistent censorship decisions."

projects.title: Portfolio with CMS

projects.description: A modern React-based portfolio website with an integrated CMS dashboard that allows dynamic management of projects, skills, experience, and contact information. Built using React, Vite, JavaScript, and responsive design principles to showcase my AI/ML and software development journey.

experience.summary:
Content Detection
Automatically identifies inappropriate content such as:
Violence
Blood/Gore
Nudity
Profanity
Hate Speech
Drug/Alcohol Usage
Timestamp Generation
Detects the exact time in the movie where objectionable content appears.
Helps reviewers quickly locate scenes instead of watching the entire film.
Content Classification
Categorizes detected content into different severity levels (Low, Medium, High).
Assists in assigning age ratings.
Automated Rating Recommendation
Suggests suitable film ratings based on detected content.
Example:
U (Universal)
U/A 13+
U/A 16+
A (Adults Only)
Content Filtering and Editing Support
Marks scenes that may require muting, blurring, or removal.
Generates reports for editors and censorship boards.
Report Generation
Creates detailed summaries containing:
Type of violation
Number of occurrences
Severity level
Timestamps
Consistency in Evaluation
Applies the same standards across all films.
Reduces human bias and subjective judgment
highlights: ✅ Improves accuracy in identifying sensitive content.
✅ Scalable for processing large volumes of movies and videos.
✅ Assists censor boards rather than replacing human reviewers.

education.details: During my B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence, I developed a strong foundation in AI/ML algorithms, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, Data Analytics, Database Management Systems, and Software Engineering. I gained hands-on experience by building projects that involved predictive modeling, image classification, automation, and intelligent decision-making systems.
